segments.text: Hath Israel no sons? hath he no heir? why then doth their king inherit Gad, and his people dwell in his cities?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I will cause an alarm of war to be heard in Rabbah of the Ammonites; and it shall be a desolate heap, and her daughters shall be burned with fire: then shall Israel be heir unto them that were his heirs
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Howl, O Heshbon, for Ai is spoiled: cry, ye daughters of Rabbah, gird you with sackcloth; lament, and run to and fro by the hedges; for their king shall go into captivity, and his priests and his princes together.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Is wisdom no more in Teman? is counsel perished from the prudent? is their wisdom vanished?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Behold, they whose judgment was not to drink of the cup have assuredly drunken; and art thou he that shall altogether go unpunished? thou shalt not go unpunished, but thou shalt surely drink of it.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I will bring thee down from thence
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Behold, he shall come up like a lion from the swelling of Jordan against the habitation of the strong: but I will suddenly make him run away from her: and who is a chosen man, that I may appoint over her? for who is like me? and who will appoint me the time? and who is that shepherd that will stand before me?
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: appoint me: or, convent me in judgment?

segments.text: Hamath is confounded, and Arpad: for they have heard evil tidings: they are fainthearted; there is sorrow on the sea; it cannot be quiet.

footnotes: on sea: or, as on the sea
heading: Concerning Damascus

segments.text: Arise ye, go up to Kedar, and spoil the men of the east.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The word of the LORD that came to Jeremiah the prophet against Elam in the beginning of the reign of Zedekiah king of Judah
